prompt: Segment the tumor in the chest CT using the reference annotation, matching both the shape and the color of segmentation.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1, which displays a chest CT scan, by applying a segmentation mask to the tumor located in the upper-left (patient's right) lung. The segmentation should precisely match the shape and the distinct blue color of the tumor annotation shown in image 2.
objects: Tumor located in the upper-left (patient's right) lung
Blue color of the segmentation mask
Precise shape of the segmentation mask
